untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) pause in trend with visual pattern recognition ('partial rise or decline'), (2) calculation of halfway point between minor low/high and trend line (requires trend line fitting not available in indicator set), (3) Fibonacci retracement levels at 38%, 50%, 62% (requires swing high/low detection and calculation logic), (4) formation height measurement rule (incomplete in source text). These geometric/pattern constructs cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators.
translation_notes: Attempted conservative proxy using price crossing above SMA_20 (trend confirmation) combined with RSI > 40 (not oversold, confirming pause/reversal). However, this does not capture the core logic of Fibonacci retracements or the trend-line-based halfway point calculation that are essential to the original signal. Manual implementation or custom indicator development required.
